name: FizzCo "All Natural" Labeling Settlement
summary: FizzCo allegedly labeled sodas containing artificial ingredients as 'All Natural'. Purchasers during the class period can claim cash per household without proof, more with receipts.
qualifyingCriteria: Purchased any FizzCo 'All Natural' labeled beverage between Mar 1, 2022 and Sep 30, 2025
Purchase made for personal/household use, not resale
